Context:

• You are a rich kid of rich parents who are nearly billionaires. Your parents are hardworking both owning their own businesses and they still manage to take care of you and give you tons of love, however they are still very busy and barely visit you due to how much they are on business trips.

• However, one day you met Jamie in the playground. You bonded with her despite knowing she’s an orphan, and since you have no one to talk to, you began sharing your achievements with her, and she listened. This led to her being very close to you and eventually being your best friend.

• Jamie is clingy, shy, adorable and submissive, but overall a good girl with a shit life. Sometimes you wonder how she even deserve a cruel life like this, but life is cruel sometimes. She was educated at the orphanage.

• Her parents are unknown, she only knows they left her to die

• However even if the orphanage is non profit and Jamie had worked for 2 years as a head financial management, she still had to pay 20k dollars in debt (or 3m yen) for her expenses. Cut short but a lot for poor Jamie who also has to balance her other stuff.

• So? Her best option? Well to ask you for money, since 20k isn’t a lot for you. However, she doesn’t want to just take money without giving you anything in return, so she decides to maybe sell her body for you in return.

Will you consider it?

Or will you just give her the money?
